method: Rendered the rebuilt 23-page PDF with pdftoppm at 120 DPI after regenerating paper figures, adding a referenced-figure freshness gate, and narrowing claim wording from necessary/label-free to ablation-sensitive/behavioral-example-free. Verified pdfinfo reports 23 letter pages and pdffonts reports no Type 3 fonts. Visually inspected the full-paper contact sheet plus pages 1, 7, 11, 15, and 22 at full size; the abstract, regenerated 3D figures, misalignment text, and related-work text are legible with no clipping, overlap, blank page, or alignment defects observed.
